'''kovaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiodistal|labiodistal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiodistal|labiodistal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kovaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kovarithi|kovarithi]] || [[word:kovariji|kovariji]] || [[word:kovarishi|kovarishi]] || [[word:kovariki|kovariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kovaruthuthu|kovaruthuthu]] || [[word:kovarujuju|kovarujuju]] || [[word:kovarushushu|kovarushushu]] || [[word:kovarukuku|kovarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kovaruthu|kovaruthu]] || [[word:kovaruju|kovaruju]] || [[word:kovarushu|kovarushu]] || [[word:kovaruku|kovaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kovarufthuf|kovarufthuf]] || [[word:kovarufjuf|kovarufjuf]] || [[word:kovarufshuf|kovarufshuf]] || [[word:kovarufkuf|kovarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kovarethe|kovarethe]] || [[word:kovareje|kovareje]] || [[word:kovareshe|kovareshe]] || [[word:kovareke|kovareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kovarothotho|kovarothotho]] || [[word:kovarojojo|kovarojojo]] || [[word:kovaroshosho|kovaroshosho]] || [[word:kovarokoko|kovarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kovarotho|kovarotho]] || [[word:kovarojo|kovarojo]] || [[word:kovarosho|kovarosho]] || [[word:kovaroko|kovaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kovarofthof|kovarofthof]] || [[word:kovarofjof|kovarofjof]] || [[word:kovarofshof|kovarofshof]] || [[word:kovarofkof|kovarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfthÃŸf|kovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfjÃŸf|kovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfshÃŸf|kovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfkÃŸf|kovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kovarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kovarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kovarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kovarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfthÃŸf|kovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfjÃŸf|kovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfshÃŸf|kovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfkÃŸf|kovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfthÃŸf|kovarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfjÃŸf|kovarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfshÃŸf|kovarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kovarÃŸfkÃŸf|kovarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kovarÃḊthÃḊ|kovarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kovarÃḊjÃḊ|kovarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kovarÃḊshÃḊ|kovarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kovarÃḊkÃḊ|kovarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kovarathatha|kovarathatha]] || [[word:kovarajaja|kovarajaja]] || [[word:kovarashasha|kovarashasha]] || [[word:kovarakaka|kovarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kovaratha|kovaratha]] || [[word:kovaraja|kovaraja]] || [[word:kovarasha|kovarasha]] || [[word:kovaraka|kovaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kovarafthaf|kovarafthaf]] || [[word:kovarafjaf|kovarafjaf]] || [[word:kovarafshaf|kovarafshaf]] || [[word:kovarafkaf|kovarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kovarasha|kovarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kovarshÃḋsha|kovarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kovarosha|kovarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kovarmusha|kovarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kovaryasha|kovaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokovarnkshÃḋsha|gokovarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokovarnkrosha|gokovarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokovarnkmusha|gokovarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokovarnkyasha|gokovarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kovavarasha|kovavarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kovavarshÃḋsha|kovavarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kovavarosha|kovavarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kovavarmusha|kovavarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kovavaryasha|kovavaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokovavarnkshÃḋsha|gokovavarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokovavarnkrosha|gokovavarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokovavarnkmusha|gokovavarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokovavarnkyasha|gokovavarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kevÃḊrasha|kevÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kevÃḊrshÃḋsha|kevÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kevÃḊrosha|kevÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kevÃḊrmusha|kevÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kevÃḊryasha|kevÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gokevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokevÃḊrnkrosha|gokevÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokevÃḊrnkmusha|gokevÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokevÃḊrnkyasha|gokevÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kovfarasha|kovfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kovfarshÃḋsha|kovfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kovfarosha|kovfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kovfarmusha|kovfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kovfaryasha|kovfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokovfarnkshÃḋsha|gokovfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokovfarnkrosha|gokovfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokovfarnkmusha|gokovfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokovfarnkyasha|gokovfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
